reason: Recordings transplant memory for illicit thrills, forcing intimate replay of lived moments.
Genetic destiny bargains with humanity as society screens the soul for the perfect candidate.
Time-looped mind cracks open under virus-scarred futures to ask who survives with truth intact.
A totalitarian dreamscape asks if honest confession can free a single soul from oppressive lies.
Bioengineered minds police empathy in a rain-soaked noir where humanity itself is at stake.
Synthetic memories reshape identity when reality and fiction bleed into darkened city walls.
Every move tracked, every word analyzed, in a staged life where secrecy is the only unknown.
Cybernetic coding questions consciousness when an agent merges flesh with uncompromising logic.
De-extincted giants reign over ethical fault lines, forcing power to question who holds the leash.
First contact rewires faith as cosmic signals offer only half-heard prayers for honesty.
